title: Usage
description: Token usage statistics for a chat completion.

prompt_tokens.description: Number of tokens in the prompt (input).

completion_tokens.description: Number of tokens in the completion (output). Includes reasoning tokens.

cached_tokens.description: Number of prompt tokens served from cache.

prompt_tokens_details.description: Breakdown of prompt token usage, or null if not available.

reasoning_tokens.description: Number of tokens used for thinking/reasoning.

completion_tokens_details.description: Breakdown of completion token usage, or null if not available.
